spec.title: Section-Level Variables — Test Dashboard
spec.description: Covers all variable types, layouts, shadowing, repeating, and edge cases for section-level variables (requires dashboardSectionVariables feature toggle).

spec.name: global_env
spec.label: Global Env
spec.description: Dashboard-level env variable — used to test shadowing by section vars

spec.name: repeat_var
spec.label: Repeat Variable
spec.description: Multi-value variable used for row and tab repeat

spec.title: All types: custom=$sec_custom, text=$sec_textbox, const=$sec_constant, interval=$sec_interval, switch=$sec_switch, query=$sec_query
spec.description: One row with every variable type as section variables

options.content:
| Type | Name | Value |
|---|---|---|
| Custom | `sec_custom` | $sec_custom |
| Textbox | `sec_textbox` | $sec_textbox |
| Constant | `sec_constant` | $sec_constant |
| Interval | `sec_interval` | $sec_interval |
| Datasource | `sec_datasource` | $sec_datasource |
| Switch | `sec_switch` | $sec_switch |
| Query | `sec_query` | $sec_query |
| Ad Hoc | `sec_adhoc` | (filter bar) |
| Group By | `sec_groupby` | (group bar) |

spec.title: Inside shadowing row: global_env=$global_env
spec.description: Section var named global_env overrides the dashboard-level one. Expected: section-override

options.content:
## Shadowing Test

`global_env` inside this row = **$global_env**

Expected: `section-override` (not the dashboard-level value)

spec.title: Collapsed row var: $collapsed_var
spec.description: Expand the row to see this. Section var should resolve.

spec.title: Nested: row_var=$nested_row_var, tab_var=$nested_tab_var
spec.description: Panel inside a tab inside a row. Should resolve both levels.

options.content:
This tab has **no section vars** of its own.

It inherits `nested_row_var` = **$nested_row_var** from the parent row via ancestry walk.

spec.title: Tab vars: custom=$tab_custom, text=$tab_textbox, interval=$tab_interval, switch=$tab_switch

options.content:
| Type | Name | Value |
|---|---|---|
| Custom | `tab_custom` | $tab_custom |
| Textbox | `tab_textbox` | $tab_textbox |
| Interval | `tab_interval` | $tab_interval |
| Switch | `tab_switch` | $tab_switch |
| Query | `tab_query` | $tab_query |
| Datasource | `tab_datasource` | $tab_datasource |

## Tab Shadowing Test

`global_env` = **$global_env**

Expected: `tab-override` (not dashboard-level value)

This tab has **no section variables**.

`global_env` = **$global_env** (should show dashboard-level value)

`tab_custom` should **not** resolve here: $tab_custom

spec.title: Tab repeat=$tab_repeat_driver, Row var=$row_in_repeated
spec.description: Row repeated by parent tab's section variable (tab_repeat_driver). Also has its own section var (row_in_repeated).

spec.title: Ancestor row var=$nested_row_var
spec.description: Row nested inside a tab inside another row, repeated by grandparent row's section variable (nested_row_var).

spec.title: Panel repeated by section var: $sec_panel_repeat_source
spec.description: This panel repeats by sec_panel_repeat_source, a multi-value section variable on the parent row. Tests DashboardGridItem.performRepeat with ancestor-walked section variables.

spec.name: tab_repeat_driver
spec.label: Tab Repeat Driver
spec.description: Multi-value variable on the tab, used to repeat a child row by ancestor section variable

spec.title: 5. Nested — Row with Tabs (both levels have vars)
Tab with own var + row var
Tab without own var (inherits row var)
8. Repeat Row by Ancestor Section Variable ($tab_repeat_driver)

spec.name: sec_panel_repeat_source
spec.label: Services (panel repeat source)
spec.description: Multi-value section variable used as the repeat source for panels inside this row
